problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: If mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression is applied to it, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
